A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame

title: 新武俠大明星
notes:
【全新內容】
1. 新玩法——古墓迷蹤：
更新後幫會活動將上線全新玩法——古墓迷蹤，少俠將與幫會成員一同探索古墓獲取豐厚的寶藏獎勵！
幫會全員在古墓中消耗火摺子解鎖地塊，每次解鎖均可收穫探墓積分，並觸發隨機事件；探索途中還會遭遇各式怪物與守門首領，挑戰首領後可開啟下一層古墓入口，向更深處繼續探險。
古墓總共可深入至第30層，最深處將會登場一名無限血量的終極首領。少俠對其造成的傷害越高，所能獲得的探墓積分就越多。活動結束後將依據積分進行排行，躋身排行榜前列可領取豐厚珍稀獎勵！
2. 新賽季——海月升平
魔龍現世，歸墟一戰，全新賽季將于6月24日正式開啟。
在本賽季中，各位少俠將迎來新的爭霸玩法，攻克城池首領，即時對戰交鋒，多樣陣營博弈，等待各位少俠前來體驗！

title: Azure Tale
notes:
1.Improved app stability, optimized user experience, and fixed some known issues.
2.Optimized device performance and significantly improved smoothness for a better experience.
3.Fixed some potential bugs and made minor improvements. Recommended for all users to update for the best experience.
4.Improved UI details and interaction logic for a more intuitive and high-quality service.

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[Optimizations & Fixes]
- Added a new "Skip" button to Honor Expedition, allowing Chiefs to instantly complete battles during Quick Challenge.

- Optimized the purchase logic for Arena Challenge Tickets in the VIP Store. When neither Arena nor 3v3 Arena is available, this item can no longer be purchased to prevent accidental Gem spending.

- Improved recruitment animations and the skip experience, and fixed a rare issue that could cause lag during consecutive recruitments.

title: Overgeared Hero: Merge RPG
notes:
Endless Tower has arrived.
Three new class-specific Endless Tower events, arenas, and ranking seasons have been added.
Clan Ranking is now available from the existing Player Ranking page with a Clan tab and server-group clan power leaderboard.
Dice and Fishing events are now connected to event-specific rankings, with ranking previews and reward structures shown on the event pages.

title: Candy Crush Soda Saga
notes:
Sodalicious! We update our game every week with exciting levels, improvements to the game, and fun new features. Download the latest version to check it out!
Joining us after a break? Welcome back! New to the game? You’ll be a pro before you know it!

title: Toy Blast
notes:
The update is ready to take off!

The farmer is asleep, and the chickens are making their move! With a clever flying machine and a dream of wheat farms, they're ready for their biggest adventure yet. Don't miss this egg-citing update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
